---
title: 'Obit John Wolfe'
date: '2020-06-08T01:29:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3309163575552551501'
blogger_filename: '/2020/06/obit-john-wolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<div class="obituary-text" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;">John Wolfe, 84, of Weiser died Feb. 11, 2012 in Weiser. Family services will be held at a later date. Thomason Funeral Home and Crematory. Condolences to the family&nbsp;<a class="obit-text-link" href="http://www.lienkaemper-thomason.com/" rel="nofollow, noindex" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #006699;" target="_blank">www.lienkaemper-thomason.com</a>&nbsp;549-1234</div><br style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;" /><div class="flower-tree" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;">To Plant Memorial Trees in memory, please visit our&nbsp;<a class="tree" data-trackclick="yes" data-vars-event-action="janus_treesbutton" data-vars-event-category="janus" data-vars-event-label="janus_obit" data-vars-event-value="0" href="https://sympathy.legacy.com/en-us/funeral-flowers/name/john-wolfe-funeral-flowers/p155872181/?affiliateId=1841&amp;pm=240" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #006699;">Sympathy Store</a>.</div><div class="obituary-publish-line" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; padding: 40px 0px;"><span style="box-sizing: border-box;">Published in Idaho Press Tribune on Feb. 14, 2012.</span></div>
